div.h3: Type erasure at registry boundary with downcast recovery

ul.li: Type Erasure: Concrete SparseSet<T> is coerced to dyn ComponentStorage.
TypeId Security: Map keys (TypeIDs) act as a compile-time proof of content.
Safe Recovery: Uses the Any trait's vtable to verify memory layout before downcasting.
Alignment: Trait objects consume 16 bytes (2 x 64-bit words) in the HashMap values.

text.tspan: // We box a concrete implementation into a trait object.
// We use the 'Any' trait to perform a checked downcast via the vtable.
// We box a concrete implementation into a trait object.
// We use the 'Any' trait to perform a checked downcast via the vtable.

div.p: TypeId::of::<Position>() -> StorageID_0 TypeId::of::<Velocity>() -> StorageID_1 TypeId::of::<Health>() -> StorageID_2
